nasb.text: He who shuts his ear to the cry of the poor Will also cry himself and not be answered.

esv.text: Whoever closes his ear to the cry of the poor will himself call out and not be answered.

cnv.text: 塞耳不聽貧窮人呼求的， 他將來呼求，也得不到應允。

ccb.text: 掩耳不听穷人呼求的， 他将来求救也无人管。

csbs.text: 塞耳不听贫弱者哀声的， 他自己呼求时也得不到回应。
